title: Level 424
wikitext: {{DISPLAYTITLE: Level 424: "The Emptiness of Space"}} {{Headerbox|header=There is nothing but you and the stars now|file=Level 424 space.png}} {{VoidedTheme|mono}} {{Background|file=Level 424 space.png}} {{Class 0|hexagon=Σ|class=Sigma|color-h=262|color-s=69%|color-l=44%|safety=Varying Oxygen|security=Cosmic Properties|entity=Low Entity Presence}} {{Blurimage|file=Level 424.png|caption=A photo of Level 424.|align=right}} == Description == Level 424, also known as "The Emptiness of Space" resembles a dimly lit cramped space station; the size of the space station is 5000 km³. As the setting entails, the level has no gravity, so prolonged travel is not recommended When exposed to zero gravity, one will have both muscle density and bone density decrease. This The level has a interesting property where oxygen levels fluctuate between 19.7% and 21% oxygen, causing drowsyness, less strength, and more brittle bones. The level has the anomalous property where the oxygen levels go from 19.7%-21% oxygen, causing drowsiness and lightheadedness. Throughout the station, cabinets with [[Object 1|almond water]] and a tube of edible paste can be found. The level is under [[Phenomenon 15]] so meeting any other wanderer is impossible. The level was discovered on October 16th, 2009, by Byson Smith (see the audio log at the end of the page). The level's halls are adorned with wires, electrical boxes, sleeping bags, oxygen tubes, and dim LED light bulbs. It is advised to not touch anything related to electricity without gloves, as they will electrocute the wanderer and turn off the lights in a small area, making travel in that area level harder. Rarely, one can come across a window, looking outside the window will reveal this level's space, a black expanse dotted with stars. Looking out separate windows show the same scene, though this scene does differ between wanderers. In level 424, there are various Airlocks. These airlocks will have a tether, and an attached to it is a spacesuit. If one plans to do a "spacewalk", they should check the state of the tether, as it can snap if badly damaged. Then, when opening the airlock, it is advised to put on the spacesuit. Miraculously, one will survive outside without one but will drift out into an indefinitely long space. After an extended period of time, the wanderer will end up in a random level. When a wanderer approaches these airlocks, they will have a strong desire to take a "spacewalk" in this space. The space is described as a black void with various small stars. If one is to look behind them, they will see the ship of the level, which is described by wanderers as a "Large, grey, meshed together cube". This does not seem to apply to the windows, as they still will show space even if they are inside the ship.There is an anomalous property in which all electromagnetic devices will shut break in this space. When outside of the ship, one will feel an intense sense of euphoria, followed by a feeling of nothingness, eventually ending up in a trance-like state. After an indefinite amount of time, this trance will end. After this, they can't experience this again until they re-enter the level. {{Blurimage|file=Level 424 space.png|caption=Level 424's space|align=left}} Throughout the level there are computers resembling laptops of various brands. Most of these laptops are broken, but in rare cases these computers can access the [[Phenomenon 2|Back-net]]. On these computers, there are files displaying bits of human history, various languages (commonly Russian, English, or Chinese), biology, and astronomy. ==Entities== There are a small number of entities in Level 424. However, other entities can only no-clip into one of the generated versions of Level 424. These entities are reported to be very safe, as they are confused by the gravity, and flail around irregularly. More intelligent entities and entities unaffected by gravity, however, are able to figure the gravity out and traverse the level as normal. In all these cases it is advised to avoid these entities, unless they are non-hostile. There have not been any reported instances of entities in the space area. * '''Smilers'''. Due to the levels dim lighting, there are [[Entity 3|smilers]] in this level. It is advised for wanderers to bring large light scores or a way to set the smiler ablaze. When a wanderer does not have these, they should shine the nearest computer on themselves, which has a small chance of making the smiler go away. *'''Windows'''. The majority of entities in level 424 are [[Entity 2|windows]]. These windows are passive and show space scenes from the [[ Frontrooms]], with Earth as a focus. These windows are believed to be anomalous as they reportedly cause feeling of nothingness from wanderers. These windows are anomalous as they show very slow action, with their shadow figures moving only once a year ==Colonies and Outposts== Due to [[phenomenon 15]] being in effect in this level, no colonies or outposts can be created. ==Entrances and Exits== === Entrances === *No-clipping into an area with lighter gravity in [[Level 401]] will bring you here. *No-clipping into a crashed satellite on any outdoor level will bring you here. === Exits === * As aforementioned, after floating in this levels space, one will enter a random level, most commonly the level they came in. * Breaking a wall will bring you back to [[Level 401]]. * No-clipping into a window will bring you to a random level. {{Collapse|num=2|initial=Recovered segment of an audio log about the discovery of Level 424. Between MEG official Jude Roberts and MEG explorer Bryson Smith|final=Date:8/16/2009|body= Agent Smith was sent on a mission to investigate the "crashed satellites" that lead to level 423. At the time, they were thought to be a new phenomenon. Smith:"So I'm in front of that metal thing you were talking about. Why do I need to see this again?" Roberts:"We've recently been getting reports of these objects throughout the Backrooms." *Smith trips and no-clips into Level 424* Roberts:"AGENT SMITH. AGENT SMITH?" Smith:"I'M HERE, god. Anyways I seem to have no-clipped into some sorta space station level?" Roberts:"Describe" Smith:"Its a space station and has wires and stuff on the walls, and there is no gravity here. Roberts:"Hmm does not seem to match any records in the database. I'll keep looking" Smith:"I'm going to keep exploring" *Various sounds can be heard as Smith explores the Level* Smith:"Ohhh what's this? An airlock and a spacesuit. I've always wanted to take a spacewalk-" Roberts:"It's not safe don't do i-" *Smith puts on the space suit* Roberts:"You're putting it on aren't you" Smith:"There is a tether its fine." Roberts:"AGENT SMITH DO NOT OPE-" *Smith opens the airlock* End of log Byson Smith was later found alive on December 3rd, 2009, in [[Level 10]].}} {{Footnotes}} {{Redirect|Prev=423|Next=425}} {{Collapse|initial='''> Open Author & Licensing Information'''|final='''> Close Author & Licensing Information'''|body='''Author''': [[User:Easali|Easali]]}} [[Category:Levels]] [[Category:Cluster I]]
